case_title: MARTINEZ, ANA TERESA vs. MACNAUGHTON, WILLIAM STUART et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, ANA TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT MACNAUGHTON, WILLIAM STUART DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-06-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-05-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-16-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-06-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-06-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-05-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-05-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-04-1994 CONTINUED FROM JAN-05-1994 TO FEB-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-04-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR APR-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, ANA TERESA
PHOTOCOPY FOR THIRD PARTY ALL REPORTING SERVICE
